headline: Energy prices will fall when U.S. destroys Iran's ability to attack tankers in Strait of Hormuz: Wright
summary: Gas prices have spiked in the U.S. as oil has jumped to over $90 since the war began in Iran.

raw.headline: Energy prices will fall when U.S. destroys Iran's ability to attack tankers in Strait of Hormuz: Wright
raw.summary: Gas prices have spiked in the U.S. as oil has jumped to over $90 since the war began in Iran.

headline: Iran continues to hit Gulf countries as Israeli strikes intensify; Tehran says new leader appointed
summary: Bahrain and the United Arab Emirates report more strikes on civilian targets as U.S.-Israeli attacks on Iran continue.

raw.headline: Iran continues to hit Gulf countries as Israeli strikes intensify; Tehran says new leader appointed
